verses.2: “Bear with me a little, and I will show you;
verses.3: I will get my knowledge from afar,
verses.4: For truly my words are not false.
verses.5: “Behold, God is mighty, and doesn’t despise anyone.
verses.6: He doesn’t preserve the life of the wicked,
verses.7: He doesn’t withdraw his eyes from the righteous,
verses.8: If they are bound in fetters,
verses.9: then he shows them their work,
verses.10: He also opens their ears to instruction,
verses.11: If they listen and serve him,
verses.12: But if they don’t listen, they will perish by the sword;
verses.13: “But those who are godless in heart lay up anger.
verses.15: He delivers the afflicted by their affliction,
verses.16: Yes, he would have allured you out of distress,
verses.17: “But you are full of the judgment of the wicked.
verses.18: Don’t let riches entice you to wrath,
verses.19: Would your wealth sustain you in distress,
verses.22: Behold, God is exalted in his power.
verses.23: Who has prescribed his way for him?
verses.25: All men have looked on it.
verses.26: Behold, God is great, and we don’t know him.
verses.27: For he draws up the drops of water,
verses.29: Indeed, can anyone understand the spreading of the clouds
verses.30: Behold, he spreads his light around him.
verses.31: For by these he judges the people.
verses.32: He covers his hands with the lightning,
